name: Paystack
description: Paystack — Nigeria and Ghana payment gateway by Stripe supporting cards, bank transfers, USSD, and mobile money with clean APIs.

seo.title: Paystack — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Paystack: Paystack — Nigeria and Ghana payment gateway by Stripe supporting cards, bank transfers, USSD, and mobile money with clean APIs.

when_to_use: Accepting cards and bank transfers for Nigerian e-commerce
USSD payments for unbanked Nigerian mobile users
Recurring subscription billing for African SaaS companies
Mobile money acceptance for Ghana via Paystack API

cons: Limited to Nigeria, Ghana, SA, Kenya, CI
review.verdict: Gold standard DX for African payments, especially Nigeria and Ghana, with Stripe backing reliability.
review.best_for: African-focused startups and SaaS wanting Stripe-quality DX with local rails
review.not_for: Merchants outside Paystack's specific country list or needing pan-African reach

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
